name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Account Deleted (Windows)
notes: This Building Block detects when a user account is deleted.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Account Deleted (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000897) Success Audit: A user account was deleted
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Account Deleted (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000897) Success Audit: A user account was deleted
